name: copilot-conductor
description: Prompt validation, model routing, and cost estimation for GitHub Copilot.

chatParticipants.name: conductor
chatParticipants.description: Validate prompt, route to best model, show cost.

commands.name: route
commands.description: Pick the best model for this prompt

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Score prompt completeness; ask follow-ups if weak

commands.name: cost
commands.description: Estimate tokens and $ for this prompt

copilotConductor.completenessThreshold.description: Below this score, Conductor asks follow-up questions instead of invoking a model.

copilotConductor.autoForward.description: After routing, forward the prompt to the chosen model and stream the answer.

copilotConductor.preferCheap.description: Bias routing toward the cheapest model that clears the quality bar.
